panels.description:
Cloud Scale stores object parts on S-nodes as separate objects.
This counter also includes special small objects (DEKs) created on S-nodes as a result of encryption rekey process, if any.
panels.title: Cloud Scale Object and Parts Count

0.text: Unavailable - Check Management API section for Storage Components in Object Storage Management UI

result.text: Unavailable - Check Management API section for Storage Components in Object Storage Management UI

panels.description:
Cloud Scale stores object parts on S-nodes as separate objects.
This counter also includes special small objects (DEKs) created on S-nodes as a result of encryption rekey process, if any.

targets.expr: sum(metadata_clientobject_part_active_count OR on() vector(0)) + sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_accept_latency_seconds_count OR on() vector(0))

panels.title: Cloud Scale Objects and Parts count

panels.description:
The number of objects/parts to be deleted on S-nodes. It's NOT the same as the number of client objects to be deleted if S3 multipart upload is used.
It's the number of objects/parts to be deleted on S-nodes.
It also includes small objects (DEKs) created on S-nodes as a result encryption rekey process, if any.

targets.expr: (sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"}) - sum(metadata_clientobject_part_active_count)) * (count(sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_initiated_count_total OR on() vector(0)) ==0) + (count(sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_initiated_count_total) > 1) OR on() vector(0)) )

(sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"} OR on() vector(0)) - sum(metadata_clientobject_part_active_count OR on() vector(0)) - sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_accept_latency_seconds_count OR on() vector(0)))

panels.title: Backlog of Undeleted Objects/Parts on S-nodes.

0.text: Unavailable - Check Management API section for Storage Components in Object Storage Management UI

panels.description:
The number of objects/parts to be deleted on S-nodes. It's NOT the same as the number of client objects to be deleted if S3 multipart upload is used.
It's the number of objects/parts to be deleted on S-nodes.

targets.expr: (sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"}) - sum(metadata_clientobject_part_active_count)) * (count(sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_initiated_count_total OR on() vector(0)) ==0) + (count(sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_initiated_count_total) > 1) OR on() vector(0)) ) / sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"})

panels.title: Backlog of Undeleted Objects/Parts on S-nodes

targets.expr: (100* sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"}) - sum(metadata_clientobject_part_active_count)) * (count(sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_initiated_count_total OR on() vector(0)) ==0) + (count(sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_initiated_count_total) > 1) OR on() vector(0)) ) / sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"})

(sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"} OR on() vector(0)) - sum(metadata_clientobject_part_active_count OR on() vector(0)) - sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_accept_latency_seconds_count OR on() vector(0)) ) / sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"})
